name: io.github.FabianSchurig/bitbucket-mcp
description: Bitbucket Cloud MCP in Go: complete API auto-generated from spec, customizable prompts.
title: Bitbucket MCP

environmentVariables.name: BITBUCKET_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Your Bitbucket username/ email (required for Basic auth, omit for workspace/repo access tokens)

environmentVariables.name: BITBUCKET_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Your Bitbucket API token or OAuth2 access token
